description:
## Goal

Add `spec/refresh_health_reporter_spec.cr` covering the
`RefreshLoop::HealthReporter` module.

## Coverage

- `REPORT_INTERVAL` and `SHUTDOWN_CHUNK` constants
- `#start` spawns a fiber with the name "health_monitor_reporter"
- `#start` is safe to call multiple times (each call spawns an
  additional fiber; document the intent or guard against it if
  the design says one reporter is enough)

## What is NOT covered

- The long-lived `report_status` body reads from
  `RefreshHealthMonitor`, `MemoryManagerActor`, `SocketManager`,
  `EventBroadcaster`, and `FiberTracker`. Stubbing all of them
  to test the full body in isolation is significant scaffolding.
  Defer that to a follow-up if a real bug surfaces in the
  reporter. The structure of the spawn loop is the testable
  part for now.
- The `interruptible_sleep` chunking is duplicated in this file
  (intentionally, per the ticket comment about it not being
  reachable from a sub-module). Not testing the duplicate
  separately; the real test lives in `Supervisor#interruptible_sleep`
  (which is also private and not yet exercised — same trade-off).

## Acceptance

- Spec file exists and follows existing conventions
- `crystal spec spec/refresh_health_reporter_spec.cr` passes
- Full suite still passes
- `ameba` clean
- `just nix-build` succeeds
title: Add spec/refresh_health_reporter_spec.cr
